rules.rule_text:
rule Backdoored_ssh
{
	meta:
		author = "Kaspersky"
		reference = "https://securelist.com/energetic-bear-crouching-yeti/85345/"
		actor = "Energetic Bear/Crouching Yeti"

	strings:
		$a1 = "OpenSSH"
		$a2 = "usage: ssh"
		$a3 = "HISTFILE"

	condition:
		uint32( 0 ) == 0x464c457f and filesize < 1000000 and all of ( $a* )
}
